description: You are managing your schedule for the FOSDEM 2024 conference in TiddlyWiki (http://localhost:8080/). Create a template tiddler named SessionTemplate that formats session data to display the title as a heading, the time, room, and speaker fields, and the session's body text. Tag the sessions Matrix 2.0, The State of Wayland, OpenStreetMap in 2024, and PostgreSQL 16 Features with the tag MySchedule. Create a dashboard tiddler named My Conference Schedule tagged with Dashboard that contains an introductory sentence and a list of all sessions tagged MySchedule, sorted chronologically by the time field and rendered using the SessionTemplate.
